title: Doc2ArchAgent Deployment YAML Schema
description: Schema for architecture/*/deployments/*.yaml — deployment mapping of containers and components to network zones. Runtime security fields are deprecated here; use deployment-security.yaml instead.

environment.description: Environment type. Controls threat severity thresholds: development suppresses MEDIUM and below, staging shows MEDIUM+, production shows all.

cloud_provider.description: Cloud provider (e.g., AWS, Azure, GCP, on-prem). Enables cloud-specific threat rules.

data_residency_region.description: Data residency region for this deployment (e.g., us-east, eu-west). Enables GDPR Art 44 checks.

data_residency_required.description: Whether data must remain in the specified region. Cross-region replication would violate this.

multi_region.description: Whether this deployment spans multiple regions for HA/DR.

failover_region.description: DR failover region. Enables recovery planning validation.

shared_responsibility_model.description: Cloud shared responsibility model. Determines which security controls are customer vs. provider managed.

tenant_isolation.description: Multi-tenancy isolation model for this deployment.

zone_placements.description: Placement of containers and components into network zones with runtime security context.

replicas.description: Number of replicas. Single replica = availability risk for critical components.

runtime_user.description: Runtime user. root=privilege escalation risk. Non-root is the security baseline.

read_only_filesystem.description: Whether the container runs with a read-only root filesystem. Prevents malware persistence.

resource_limits_set.description: Whether CPU/memory resource limits are configured. Prevents resource exhaustion.

network_policy_enforced.description: Whether Kubernetes NetworkPolicy or equivalent restricts pod-to-pod traffic.

image_registry.description: Container image registry URL. Enables supply chain provenance checks.

image_tag.description: Container image tag. 'latest' tag is a supply chain risk.

image_digest.description: Container image SHA256 digest for immutable reference.

image_signed.description: Whether the container image is signed (cosign/Notary). SLSA Level 2+ requirement.

vulnerability_scan_date.description: Date of last container vulnerability scan.
